title: Data & Cookie Policy
heroSubtitle: How we use cookies and local storage to provide a secure and personalised experience.

cookieTypes.name: Essential Cookies
cookieTypes.desc: Required for the app to function. They enable core features like secure login, session management, and payment processing. These cannot be disabled.

cookieTypes.name: Analytics Cookies
cookieTypes.desc: Help us understand how users interact with CulturePass. We use anonymised analytics to improve the user experience, identify popular features, and fix issues.

cookieTypes.name: Preference Cookies
cookieTypes.desc: Remember your settings such as language preference, selected location, theme, and notification preferences. These make your experience more personalised.

cookieTypes.name: Marketing Cookies
cookieTypes.desc: Used to deliver relevant event recommendations and sponsor offers based on your interests and browsing behaviour. You can opt out of these at any time.

sections.title: 1. What Are Cookies & Local Storage?
sections.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you use a website. CulturePass also uses local storage (AsyncStorage on mobile) to save your preferences and session data. On mobile devices, we use equivalent technologies to cookies for the same purposes.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Data
sections.body:
We use cookies and local storage to:
• Keep you signed in securely
• Remember your location and community preferences
• Store your onboarding progress
• Save your event bookmarks and joined communities
• Analyse app performance and usage patterns
• Personalise event recommendations
• Deliver relevant sponsor content and perks

sections.title: 3. Third-Party Data Collection
sections.body:
Some of our partners may collect data through their own cookies when you interact with their content on CulturePass:
• Payment processors (Stripe) for secure transactions
• Analytics providers for usage insights
• Event organisers for ticket delivery

These third parties have their own privacy policies governing their data collection.

sections.title: 4. Managing Your Preferences
sections.body:
You can manage your data preferences through:
• In-app settings: Profile > Notifications to control marketing communications
• Device settings: Clear app data or cache through your device settings
• Browser settings: For web users, manage cookies through your browser preferences
• Contact us: Email hello@culturepass.app to request data deletion

sections.title: 5. Data Retention for Cookies
sections.body:
Essential cookies: Expire when your session ends or after 30 days of inactivity
Analytics data: Retained for 26 months in anonymised form
Preference cookies: Stored until you clear them or delete your account
Marketing cookies: Expire after 12 months or when you opt out

sections.title: 6. Compliance
sections.body:
This Data & Cookie Policy complies with:
• Australian Privacy Act 1988
• EU/UK General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
• Canadian PIPEDA
• UAE Federal Decree Law No. 45 of 2021
• New Zealand Privacy Act 2020

We regularly review and update our practices to ensure ongoing compliance.

sections.title: 7. Updates to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this policy as our services evolve. Material changes will be communicated via in-app notifications or email. The "Last updated" date at the top indicates when the policy was last revised.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.body:
For questions about our data practices:
